title: Characterizing Schedules Based on Serializability
description: A flowchart that categorizes transaction schedules based on their conflict equivalence to a serial schedule, leading to the determination of whether they are serializable and conflict-serializable.
relationships: A Schedule is checked for Conflict Serializability. If yes, it is Conflict Serializable. If no, it is checked for View Serializability. If yes, it is View Serializable (but not Conflict Serializable). If no, it is a Non-Serializable Schedule. All Conflict Serializable schedules are also View Serializable. A Serial Schedule is the basis for comparison and is both Conflict and View Serializable by definition.
